series_metadata.series_description: The complete and official registration list for each precinct of all qualified registered voters in the precinct that must be prepared fourteen (14) days before an election. Per R.C. 3503.23, this list (in paper or electronic form) is to be made available at the board of elections for viewing by the public during normal business hours.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two (2) years ; Electronic: two (2) years
